method.name: deterministic_local_semantic_candidate_generation
method.decision_policy: Project accepted data-view surfaces into boundary-scoped local semantic ontology candidates. Accepted semantic context may seed candidate labels, but unconfirmed local boundaries and missing local vocabulary sources block shared ontology promotion.

semantic_readiness.shared_ontology_promotion_condition: Requires explicit local boundary, repeated workbook-pair evidence, conflict checks, and human review.

local_semantic_candidates.label: 60일 수익인식 배분 스케줄
observed_terms: [데뷔 패키지] 온라인 한국어 튜터 데뷔 프로젝트

parser_observations.message: Local boundary is not confirmed; candidates are not promotable to shared ontology.
No local policy or vocabulary source is available; local semantics require human review.
16 accepted data-view surfaces still need semantic labels.
